title: Important hyperparameters should be specified for machine learning libraries estimators and optimizers
description: Ensure that important hyperparameters are explicitly set for machine learning libraries estimators and optimizers.
message: Missing important hyperparameters for machine learning libraries estimators and optimizers.
impact: Performance, accuracy, and reproducibility issues may occur.

noncompliant.code:
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
model = LogisticRegression()
noncompliant.description: LogisticRegression is created without any hyperparameters.

compliant.code:
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
model = LogisticRegression(C=1.0, penalty='l2')
compliant.description: LogisticRegression is created with C and penalty hyperparameters.

why_is_this_an_issue: Important hyperparameters affect the performance, accuracy, and reproducibility of machine learning models.
how_to_fix: Explicitly set important hyperparameters in the machine learning libraries' estimators and optimizers.

metadata.title: Important hyperparameters should be specified for machine learning libraries estimators and optimizers
